description: Legal document. Location: Fustat. Dated: Friday, 26 Kislev 1401 Seleucid = 2 December 1089 CE. A divorced man, David b. Mevorakh Ibn [...], now remarrying another woman, undertakes to provide for his divorcee Sitt al-Bayt bt. Yosef (the mother of his son Abū l-ʿAlāʾ) 1/3 dinar per month (= 4 dinars per year) for a period of 4 years. If she should decide to remarry him, the promise is void. The payment will be made through her son.
description_he: מסמך משפטי, פוסטאט, 2 בדצמבר 1089. גבר גרוש שנישא מחדש מתחייב לשלם לגרושתו 4 דינרים לשנה לארבע שנים.
